name: awesome-design-md
focus: agent-readable design systems derived from real products
teaches: how premium websites can be translated into DESIGN.md instructions for agents
how to express visual systems in plain English and markdown
how to reuse style direction across threads and projects without screenshots
how DESIGN.md can complement AGENTS.md in an agent-driven workflow
avoid: treating one borrowed DESIGN.md as perfect for every product
copying brand-specific choices without adapting them to the founder taste profile
confusing inspiration with permission to clone a product
why_this_matters: A strong bridge between visual references and agent-executable design direction.
reusable_lesson: A good DESIGN.md can carry design intent across projects, but it works best when adapted to the product and founder taste.
